3180450.name: Battle Squares
3180450.description:
Channel your 4 corners and start aiming — it's time to fight!

Battle Squares is a fast-paced, online 2D shooter with 8-directional chaos and colorful, corner-fueled mayhem.

Customize your square:

  • Choose your weapons

  • Pick your color

  • Square up with your own custom shape

Tumble. Bounce. Recoil. DOMINATE.

Combine 2 unique classes, each tailored to different playstyles.

Your class isn't just a loadout — it's your style, your skill, your statement.

Crave raw power and explosive destruction? Grenade. Rocket Launcher.

Need speed and a thirst for chaos? Charge. Shotgun.

Want to fly and wreak havoc mid-air? Mini-gun. Revolver.

All about precision and proving it's not a skill issue? Revolver. Sniper.

Mix and match classes to find the combo that fits your twisted, square-shaped soul.
Discover your perfect setup, and shatter the competition.

One arena. Infinite combos. Zero mercy.
Are you the square to rule them all?
